text.title: Traceability Auto-Maintenance — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are SoR connectors available and is a named alert owner assigned?

conclusion.verdict: run daily build with versioned schema

example.trace: ENG-42 → connectors live → owner assigned → 95% compliance → daily build active
